description: Synthetic ASTM E1394 record set (H->P->O->R->L) for one DiaSys R920 glucose result, framed on the wire by the ASTM E1381 codec (LIS-23 / S2.1). The application payload is CR-separated records; the AstmTransport applies STX/FN/checksum/ETX framing at replay time. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.note: Application payload only (CR-separated E1394 records); the E1381 transport applies the STX FN text ETX C1 C2 CR LF envelope + modulo-256 checksum at replay time. A real DiaSys R920 ASTM-HOST capture replaces this in LIS-30 (bench conformance): set synthetic:false with a capture reference. E1394 record parsing is S2.2 / LIS-24.
